perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video features a middle-aged male presenter wearing a brown sweater, a plaid flat cap, and green-rimmed glasses against a plain white background. He gestures dynamically, pointing at the camera and using hand signals to emphasize his points. (2) The scene transitions to a screen recording of an iPhone's settings menu. The presenter is still visible as a small, circular cutout in the lower corner, continuing his gestures while explaining the interface. (3) The video cuts back to the full-screen view of the presenter, who waves his hand and smiles to conclude the segment.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks energetically in Mandarin Chinese. An upbeat, fast-tempo electronic BGM starts immediately. (2) The male voice continues explaining technical settings with a steady, enthusiastic tone. The background music remains consistent in volume and tempo. (3) The vocal narration concludes with a friendly sign-off, and the audio ends cleanly without lingering sound effects.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '更新iOS18' - Blue decorative hook text. (2) '結果打FaceTime 花了5700塊錢' - Purple hook text describing a problem. (3) '拿到了電話費的帳單' - Blue hook text. (4) '現在馬上教你怎麼設定' - Red hook text signaling the solution. (5) 'FaceTime', '預設通話 App', '行動網路通話' - Functional text within the iOS settings UI. (6) '這個時候 才可以 萬無一失啊各位' - Blue concluding hook text.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Problem Hook -> Step-by-step Tutorial -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting the content.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged Asian male, wearing a brown pullover sweater, a grey plaid flat cap, green-rimmed glasses, and a yellow smartwatch.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, minimalist white wall with no additional decor, focusing attention on the presenter.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as an educational warning for iPhone users who have updated to iOS 18. It addresses a specific issue where FaceTime calls might default to cellular data (roaming) instead of WiFi, causing high phone bills. The presenter provides a visual guide on how to change the settings to ensure 'zero failure' and avoid unnecessary costs.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy presentation style, 'Tim哥' branding in the corner, use of large, colorful Traditional Chinese text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets Apple users in Taiwan, specifically those concerned with mobile data costs after system updates.
